[[File:SupergirlHomestyleExample.png|thumb|271x271px|home style example from current Seasonal Event [[Supergirl]]]]
'''Furniture''' and interior items are items that can be used to decorate a [[birbhouse]]. Users can collect furniture or interior items during a [[Seasonal Events|seasonal event]], or purchase items using rainbow stones in the shop [[Finkea Furnishings]]. 

There are 10 categories of furniture items.

There are 4 categories of interior items. 

As of June 2026, there has been 44 seasonal events. There are four additional furniture collections that were released before the implementation of seasonal events.  

== Changing Furnishings ==
To change furnishings, select the Bag tab at the bottom of the screen. Select Furniture from the options. Furnishings you own are grouped by type. Tap an item of furniture to place it in your home.

==Furniture==
Items marked with * are also in the [[Everyday Collection]].

Items marked with ** are only available to purchase in [[Finkea Furnishings]] seasonally. October and December collections are seasonal collections and only available during their respective months and the two weeks leading up to them.

===Bed===
The bed is on the left side of the room. During designated sleeping hours, the user's [[birb]] sleeps on the bed.
